hypothesis: If polymer sequences and patterned surfaces are encoded with a 2D convolutional network for surfaces and a GRU for polymers combined via a multi-head attention mechanism (with symmetry-based augmentation), then the hybrid model will predict MD-computed polymer–surface binding free energies more accurately (lower MAE) than baseline fully connected DNNs and alternative polymer encoders such as 1D CNNs, LSTMs, and BiGRUs.
